chat: func Wrap(model Model, middlewares ...CallMiddleware) Model
chat: func WrapStream(streamer Streamer, middlewares ...StreamMiddleware) Streamer
chat: type CallMiddleware func(next Model) Model
chat: type Choice struct { Index int `json:"index"` Message *Message `json:"message,omitempty"` FinishReason FinishReason `json:"finish_reason,omitempty"` Extensions metadata.Map `json:"extensions,omitempty"` }
chat: type FinishReason string
chat: type Message struct { Role Role `json:"role"` Parts []Part `json:"parts"` Metadata metadata.Map `json:"metadata,omitempty"` }
chat: type Model interface { Call(ctx context.Context, req *Request) (*Response, error) }
chat: type ModelFunc func(ctx context.Context, req *Request) (*Response, error)
chat: type Options struct { Model string `json:"model,omitempty"` FrequencyPenalty *float64 `json:"frequency_penalty,omitempty"` MaxTokens *int64 `json:"max_tokens,omitempty"` PresencePenalty *float64 `json:"presence_penalty,omitempty"` Stop []string `json:"stop,omitempty"` Temperature *float64 `json:"temperature,omitempty"` TopK *int64 `json:"top_k,omitempty"` TopP *float64 `json:"top_p,omitempty"` }
chat: type Part struct { Kind PartKind `json:"kind"` Text string `json:"text,omitempty"` Media *media.Media `json:"media,omitempty"` Signature []byte `json:"signature,omitempty"` ToolCall *ToolCall `json:"tool_call,omitempty"` ToolResult *ToolResult `json:"tool_result,omitempty"` }
chat: type PartKind string
chat: type Request struct { Messages []Message `json:"messages"` Tools []ToolDefinition `json:"tools,omitempty"` Options Options `json:"options,omitzero"` Extensions metadata.Map `json:"extensions,omitempty"` }
chat: type Response struct { ID string `json:"id,omitempty"` Model string `json:"model,omitempty"` Choices []Choice `json:"choices,omitempty"` Usage Usage `json:"usage,omitzero"` Extensions metadata.Map `json:"extensions,omitempty"` }
chat: type ResponseAccumulator struct { response Response choices []accumulatedChoice byIndex map[int]int seen bool }
chat: type Role string
chat: type StreamMiddleware func(next Streamer) Streamer
chat: type Streamer interface { Stream(ctx context.Context, req *Request) iter.Seq2[*Response, error] }
chat: type StreamerFunc func(ctx context.Context, req *Request) iter.Seq2[*Response, error]
chat: type ToolCall struct { ID string `json:"id"` Name string `json:"name"` Arguments string `json:"arguments,omitempty"` }
chat: type ToolDefinition struct { Name string `json:"name"` Description string `json:"description,omitempty"` InputSchema json.RawMessage `json:"input_schema"` }
chat: type ToolResult struct { ID string `json:"id"` Name string `json:"name"` Result string `json:"result"` IsError bool `json:"is_error,omitempty"` }
chat: type Usage struct { InputTokens int64 `json:"input_tokens,omitempty"` OutputTokens int64 `json:"output_tokens,omitempty"` ReasoningTokens *int64 `json:"reasoning_tokens,omitempty"` CacheReadInputTokens *int64 `json:"cache_read_input_tokens,omitempty"` CacheWriteInputTokens *int64 `json:"cache_write_input_tokens,omitempty"` }

vectorstore/filter: func (b *ExprBuilder) NE(l, r any) *ExprBuilder
vectorstore/filter: func (b *ExprBuilder) Not(fn func(*ExprBuilder)) *ExprBuilder
vectorstore/filter: func (b *ExprBuilder) Or(fn func(*ExprBuilder)) *ExprBuilder

vectorstore/filter: func (l *Literal) IsNumber() bool

vectorstore/filter: func (l *Literal) IsString() bool
vectorstore/filter: func (l *Literal) Start() Position
vectorstore/filter: func (o Operator) Is(other Operator) bool

vectorstore/filter: func (o Operator) IsLogicalOperator() bool
vectorstore/filter: func (o Operator) IsMatchingOperator() bool
vectorstore/filter: func (o Operator) IsNullOperator() bool
vectorstore/filter: func (o Operator) IsOrderingOperator() bool
vectorstore/filter: func (o Operator) IsUnaryOperator() bool

vectorstore/filter: func (o Operator) Precedence() int
vectorstore/filter: func (o Operator) String() string
vectorstore/filter: func (p Position) String() string
vectorstore/filter: func (u *UnaryExpr) End() Position
vectorstore/filter: func (u *UnaryExpr) Equal(other Expr) bool
vectorstore/filter: func (u *UnaryExpr) Precedence() int
vectorstore/filter: func (u *UnaryExpr) Start() Position
vectorstore/filter: func And[L ComputedExpr, R ComputedExpr](l L, r R) *BinaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func EQ[L IdentifierValue | *IndexExpr, R LiteralValue](l L, r R) *BinaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func GE[L IdentifierValue | *IndexExpr, R Number | *Literal](l L, r R) *BinaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func GT[L IdentifierValue | *IndexExpr, R Number | *Literal](l L, r R) *BinaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func In[L IdentifierValue | *IndexExpr, R ListValue](l L, r R) *BinaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func Index[L IdentifierValue | *IndexExpr, I Number | string | *Literal](left L, index I) *IndexExpr
vectorstore/filter: func IsNotNull[L IdentifierValue | *IndexExpr](l L) *UnaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func IsNull[L IdentifierValue | *IndexExpr](l L) *BinaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func LE[L IdentifierValue | *IndexExpr, R Number | *Literal](l L, r R) *BinaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func LT[L IdentifierValue | *IndexExpr, R Number | *Literal](l L, r R) *BinaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func Like[L IdentifierValue | *IndexExpr, R string | *Literal](l L, r R) *BinaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func NE[L IdentifierValue | *IndexExpr, R LiteralValue](l L, r R) *BinaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func NewExprBuilder() *ExprBuilder
vectorstore/filter: func NewIdent[T IdentifierValue](value T) *Ident
vectorstore/filter: func NewListLiteral[T ListValue](value T) *ListLiteral
vectorstore/filter: func NewLiteral[T LiteralValue](value T) *Literal
vectorstore/filter: func NewLiterals[T LiteralValue](values []T) []*Literal
vectorstore/filter: func Not[T ComputedExpr](r T) *UnaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func Or[L ComputedExpr, R ComputedExpr](l L, r R) *BinaryExpr
vectorstore/filter: func Parse(input string) (Expr, error)
vectorstore/filter: func Validate(expr Expr) error
vectorstore/filter: type AtomicExpr interface { Expr atomicExpr() }
vectorstore/filter: type BinaryExpr struct { Left Expr Op Operator Right Expr start Position end Position }
vectorstore/filter: type ComputedExpr interface { Expr computedExpr() }
vectorstore/filter: type Expr interface { Start() Position End() Position Equal(Expr) bool expr() }
vectorstore/filter: type ExprBuilder struct { err error expr ComputedExpr }
vectorstore/filter: type Ident struct { Value string start Position end Position }
vectorstore/filter: type IdentifierValue interface { string | *Ident }
vectorstore/filter: type IndexExpr struct { Left Expr Index *Literal start Position end Position }
vectorstore/filter: type ListLiteral struct { Values []*Literal start Position end Position }
vectorstore/filter: type ListValue interface { []int | []int8 | []int16 | []int32 | []int64 | []uint | []uint8 | []uint16 | []uint32 | []uint64 | []float32 | []float64 | []string | []bool | []*Literal | *ListLiteral }
vectorstore/filter: type Literal struct { Kind LiteralKind Value string start Position end Position }
vectorstore/filter: type LiteralKind string
vectorstore/filter: type LiteralValue interface { Number | string | bool | *Literal }
vectorstore/filter: type Number interface { ~int | ~int8 | ~int16 | ~int32 | ~int64 | ~uint | ~uint8 | ~uint16 | ~uint32 | ~uint64 | ~float32 | ~float64 }
vectorstore/filter: type Operator string
vectorstore/filter: type Position struct { Line int Column int }
vectorstore/filter: type UnaryExpr struct { Op Operator Right ComputedExpr start Position end Position }
vectorstore: const ( DefaultTopK = 5 MinSimilarityScore = 0.0 MaxSimilarityScore = 1.0 AcceptAllScores = MinSimilarityScore )
vectorstore: func (r SearchRequest) Validate() error
vectorstore: func (w writeFunc) Write(ctx context.Context, docs []*document.Document) error
vectorstore: func NewDocumentWriter(indexer Indexer) document.Writer
vectorstore: type FilterDeleter interface { DeleteWhere(ctx context.Context, expr filter.Expr) error }
vectorstore: type IDDeleter interface { DeleteIDs(ctx context.Context, ids []string) error }
vectorstore: type Indexer interface { Add(ctx context.Context, docs []*document.Document) error }
vectorstore: type Match struct { Document *document.Document `json:"document"` Score float64 `json:"score"` }
vectorstore: type SearchRequest struct { Query string `json:"query,omitempty"` TopK int `json:"top_k,omitempty"` MinScore float64 `json:"min_score,omitempty"` Filter filter.Expr `json:"-"` }
vectorstore: type Searcher interface { Search(ctx context.Context, request SearchRequest) ([]Match, error) }
vectorstore: var ( ErrEmptyDocuments = errors.New("vectorstore: documents must not be empty") ErrMissingFilter = errors.New("vectorstore: filter is required") )
